topic: three-part ratios and part-to-whole ratios with fractions
latex:
A certain recipe for trail mix calls for $4$ cups of peanuts, $7$ cups of raisins, and $5$ cups of cashews. Write a three-part ratio representing the mix. Then write a part-to-whole ratio of cashews to the total trail mix. Finally, write a fraction in simplest form to express the proportion of cashews to the whole.

cashews : peanuts : raisins $=$ \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_

cashews : trail mix $=$ \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_

Proportion of cashews (out of whole) $=$ \_\_\_\_
